task_objective: Freeze and verify the complete Steam app systemd scope for the duration of the renewable launch-gate lease, so processes that join after launch cannot escape save verification or conflict resolution.
tests_added: Synthetic unified-cgroup discovery and ownership validation
Exact Steam app scope and cgroup-root traversal/symlink rejection
Bounded systemctl argv, timeout, environment, and failure behavior
Requested/completed freezer-state polling and idempotent disappearance
Scope lease renewal after launcher exit and unexpected-thaw rejection
Same-scope rotation, PID-reuse identity transition, thaw retry, expiry, ceiling, stop, and concurrent pause/resume behavior
Historical and scope-freeze launch-gate log correlation

red_evidence.result: Expected collection failure: ModuleNotFoundError for sdh_ludusavi.launch_gate before the controller existed.
Expected 21 failures: ProcessWatchdog did not accept a scope controller and still contained the PID-signal fallback.
Expected two failures: new scope logs were not correlated and the diagram still promised SIGSTOP/SIGCONT behavior.

design_decisions: Discover the authoritative unit only from the launch PID unified cgroup entry and accept one exact current-user app.slice Steam scope.
Store cgroup device/inode identity and revalidate the exact path before every state read or systemd transition.
Use systemctl user freeze/thaw with argv execution, bounded output/timeouts, and user-bus defaults only when Decky did not supply them.
Declare a gate successful only when cgroup.freeze and cgroup.events agree on the completed state; best-effort thaw partial freezes.
Rotate a verified same-scope lease without a thaw window; thaw a different stored identity before freezing the replacement.
Retain leases after retryable thaw failures and remove them only after verified thaw or confirmed scope disappearance.
Replace obsolete PID-tree service tests because the plan explicitly removes that runtime behavior; public RPC signatures and result shapes remain unchanged.
Preserve historical analyzer grammar alongside the new scope-transition grammar and stable finding IDs.

results.focused: 191 plan-listed focused tests passed before the final concurrency regression was added; the watchdog suite then passed 22 tests
results.frontend: 31 Vitest files and 286 tests passed; TypeScript checking, production build, and supply-chain verification passed
results.package: Local out/SDH-Ludusavi.zip built and passed validate_plugin_zip.py
results.dependencies: No Python, TypeScript, or package dependency changes
results.api_compatibility: Pause, renew, and resume RPC names, arguments, and successful result fields are unchanged

field_context: The sanitized incident example remains app-steam-app3156562597-12992.scope with root PID 12992; the implementation does not copy raw device logs or device paths.
deferred_on_device_verification: Installation, development release dispatch, and Steam Deck acceptance are intentionally deferred until separately authorized. Field verification must prove later Steam/Proton PIDs remain frozen during an unanswered conflict and that every resolution/unload/expiry path thaws exactly once.
